creator: steve@hassard.net
text:
pcn fails to work when using FreeBSD under the VirtualBox
(http://www.virtualbox.org/) virtualization software.

The machine is unable to pull DHCP addresses from a local DHCP server,
and is unable to send or receive packets over the network when configured
with a static IP address.

FreeBSD 6.2 worked flawlessly with VirtualBox.

I don't have physical hardware for the pcn driver, and am only able to
test in a virtualized environment.

How-To-Repeat: Download VirtualBox v1.5.2 (http://www.virtualbox.org/), create a new VM,
and proceed through the install. The network fails to work.
